{{Infobox location
| name = Am’haranai crypts
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Am’haranai crypts]] are located in the rooms around [[Zhen]] and [[Shera]].}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
